# bngsim — SBML Test Suite unsupported-tag manifest (GH #241).
#
# GENERATED from bngsim._sbml_unsupported.manifest_text() by
# testrunner/gen_manifest.py — do not edit by hand; a unit test
# (test_sbml_unsupported_manifest.py) asserts this file matches the SSOT.
#
# Each tag marks a construct/test-type bngsim refuses under ODE, so the
# official grading reports those cases as 'Unsupported' rather than
# 'Error'. Reasons:
#   CSymbolDelay: delay() turns the system into a delay-differential equation (DDE); bngsim has no DDE solver
#   AlgebraicRule: a non-empty AlgebraicRule is a DAE constraint defining a variable implicitly; bngsim has no DAE solver
#   FastReaction, MultipleFastReactions: fast="true" declares a fast-equilibrium constraint; bngsim has no fast-equilibrium constraint solver
#   fbc: flux-balance (FluxBalanceSteadyState) cases are not TimeCourse; bngsim is a time-course ODE engine
#
# NOT declared (documented honest NoMatch, not a capability gap): CSymbolAvogadro (SI-exact constant), RandomEventExecution (supported reproducibly-per-seed).
#
# Paste-ready comma-joined form for the runner UI:
#   AlgebraicRule, CSymbolDelay, FastReaction, MultipleFastReactions, fbc

AlgebraicRule
CSymbolDelay
FastReaction
MultipleFastReactions
fbc
